MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-30-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Mark Romeo, Esq., for Cross Complainant Brenda Clark, also present.
No appearance by the Cross Defendants: Barrak Enterprises, LLC. dba Barak Healthcare Services and Donna S. Ben Barrak aka donna Barrak, ind and dba Barrak enterprises and Barrak Healthcare Services, and Amos Ben Barrak ind and dba Barrak Enterprises and Barrak Healthcare Services.
09:45 am. - Cross Complainant was sworn, testified and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - First Amended Complaint------------ ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Notice of Entry of Order on Motion for Summary Judgment------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #3 - Calculation of Claim -------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, the Court grants Judgment in favor of the Cross Complanant and against the Cross Defendants.
Matter is under submission and amount of Judgment to be determined.

Jan. 30, 2004
Judgment on Cross Complaint signed by Comm. Kaplan.
Principal amount of $29,000.00
Prejudgment interest of $8,900.47
Attorney's fees by stature , in the amount of $15,440.50
Costs: per memorandum of costs.
Total Judgment of $53,340.97

(Mr. Romeo will pick up the Judgment and the exhibits on Monday Feb. 2, 2004 in Dept. 218 at 09:00 a.m.).
